channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Yoroi-Shinden Samurai Troopers Anime的 2nd Part Previews Ending Theme 新作 Video
item.description: Show's 2nd part debuts on July 7 ― The staff for Yoroi Shin Den Samurai Troopers, the new sequel anime of the Yoroiden Samurai Troopers series, revealed a second promotional video on Friday for the... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Yoroi-Shinden Samurai Troopers Anime's 2nd Part Previews Ending Theme in New Video
